commitMessage: Fix bug where repeating larger/smaller would cycle displays

other._0:
switch self {
        case .firstThird, .firstTwoThirds, .centerThird, .centerTwoThirds, .lastTwoThirds, .lastThird:
            return .thirds
        case .smaller, .larger, .smallerWidth, .largerWidth, .smallerHeight, .largerHeight:
            return .size
        case .previousDisplay, .nextDisplay:
            return .display
        default: return nil
        }

switch self {
        case .firstThird, .firstTwoThirds, .centerThird, .centerTwoThirds, .lastTwoThirds, .lastThird:
            return .thirds
        case .smaller, .larger, .smallerWidth, .largerWidth, .smallerHeight, .largerHeight:
            return .size
        case .previousDisplay, .nextDisplay:
            return .display
        default: return nil
        }
